ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Certificate number SEG-25D-320941. Original (1/1).

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Invoice number 25-815758 dated 2025-07-30. Page 1 of 1.

document_classification.classification_notes: Document A page 1 is the Certificate of Origin. Document A pages 2-3 contain a copy of invoice 25-815756 embedded within the certificate file (this is NOT the invoice for verification per rule 8.5.0). Document B page 1 is the separate invoice file containing invoice 25-815758 — this is the invoice for verification.

document_pairing.method: File-based pairing per rule 8.5.0. Certificate from file 1 (Document A page 1). Invoice for verification from file 2 (Document B page 1, invoice 25-815758).
document_pairing.pairing_notes: The certificate does NOT contain an explicit invoice number reference. The certificate file (Document A) also contains an embedded invoice (25-815756) on pages 2-3, but per rule 8.5.0 this is supplementary material — verification must use the separate invoice file (Document B, invoice 25-815758). The consignor (Volvo Bus Corporation) and consignee (Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.) match between certificate and the invoice in Document B. However, the certificate describes 4 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE with specific VIN numbers (224281, 224317, 224318, 224319), while invoice 25-815758 describes 2 Volvo Bus chassis B8R with different VIN numbers (224321, 224336). This is a significant content discrepancy.

pairing_validation.notes: At least one criterion met (both consignor and consignee identifiable). Pairing validation passed. However, goods content differs significantly between certificate and invoice — this will be evaluated in checkpoint 4.3.

lc_check.lc_verification_notes: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate.

consignor.invoice_value: Volvo Bus Corporation, VAT No SE556197382601, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Volvo Bus Corporation' anywhere in invoice file.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'Volvo Bus Corporation' appears in the invoice header, footer, buyer block, and certification text.

comparison_steps.description: Verify company name and country match.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Volvo Bus Corporation', Sweden. Invoice: 'Volvo Bus Corporation' (header), 'SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden' (footer). Name is identical. Country Sweden confirmed via footer address and VAT prefix SE.

comparison_steps.description: VAT number SE556197382601 has SE prefix confirming Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure – consignor name found in invoice header and footer
Country verified via VAT prefix SE

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Volvo Bus Corporation, Gropegårdsgatan 1, 405 08, GOTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'Volvo Bus Corporation' in header with VAT No SE556197382601, address 'SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden' in footer. Company name is identical after normalization. Country Sweden verified via explicit address in footer and VAT prefix SE. MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E, Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo, Egypt
consignee.invoice_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E., Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo - Egypt

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary consignee/billing field in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has 'Mottagare/Consignee' field containing 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.' This is the primary consignee field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice consignee name.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' vs Invoice: 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.' — identical after normalization (minor punctuation difference: 'S.A.E' vs 'S.A.E.').
Certificate: Egypt (from box 2). Invoice: 'Cairo - Egypt' in consignee address. Country matches.

rules_applied.description: Primary consignee field identified in invoice

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E'. Invoice consignee: 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.' Name is identical (minor trailing period difference is punctuation normalization). Address matches: 'Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo'. Country Egypt confirmed in both. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value: 4 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE, VIN: YV3T7U529TA224281, YV3T7U524TA224317, YV3T7U526TA224318, YV3T7U528TA224319
goods_description.invoice_value: Volvo Bus chassis B8R, Qty 2, VIN: YV3T7U526TA224321, YV3T7U528TA224336

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in the certificate.
comparison_steps.result: No formal article numbers in certificate. VIN numbers serve as unique identifiers.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 – Priority 2: Controlled text matching – model identification
comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE'. Invoice: 'Volvo Bus chassis B8R'. The identity-bearing designation is 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE'. In the invoice, the designation is 'Volvo Bus chassis B8R'. 'B8RLE' vs 'B8R' — these are DIFFERENT model designations. B8RLE is a specific low-entry variant, B8R is the standard variant. This is not a normalization difference — it is a different product model.

comparison_steps.description: Compare VIN numbers between certificate and invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate VINs: YV3T7U529TA224281, YV3T7U524TA224317, YV3T7U526TA224318, YV3T7U528TA224319. Invoice VINs: YV3T7U526TA224321, YV3T7U528TA224336. NONE of the certificate VINs match any invoice VIN. These are entirely different vehicles.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies 4 units, invoice specifies 2 units.
comparison_steps.result: Quantity differs: 4 vs 2. Different number of vehicles.

comparison_steps.description: The certificate describes 4 B8RLE chassis with specific VINs. The invoice describes 2 B8R chassis with entirely different VINs. The model designation differs (B8RLE vs B8R), the quantity differs (4 vs 2), and none of the VIN numbers match. This is a clear MISMATCH — the certificate and invoice describe different consignments of different vehicles.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' not identifiable in invoice which states 'Volvo Bus chassis B8R'
VIN numbers completely different between certificate and invoice

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate describes '4 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' with VINs ending in 224281, 224317, 224318, 224319. The invoice (25-815758 from Document B) describes '2 Volvo Bus chassis B8R' with VINs ending in 224321, 224336. Three critical differences: (1) Model designation B8RLE ≠ B8R — different models, not a normalization issue. (2) Quantity 4 ≠ 2. (3) All four VIN numbers in the certificate are completely absent from the invoice. The embedded invoice in the certificate file (25-815756) would match, but per rule 8.5.0 verification must use the separate invoice file. This is a clear MISMATCH — the certificate and invoice describe different shipments.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: B8RLE could be considered a variant of B8R and therefore match
rejected_hypotheses.reason: B8RLE and B8R are different model designations. 'LE' (Low Entry) denotes a specific bus variant. Per rule 4.3.3, the identity-bearing main designation must be identifiable exactly. 'B8RLE' cannot be found in the invoice which states 'B8R'. This is a word-level difference (different model), not a minor spelling variation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Use the embedded invoice 25-815756 from the certificate file for verification
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rule 8.5.0, verification must use the invoice from the separate invoice file (Document B, invoice 25-815758), not embedded invoices from the certificate file. The embedded invoice is supplementary material.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'GW 24040 kg'. This is the verification-basis quantity per rule 4.4.2.1.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 – Occurrence check: GW 24040 kg in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 24040 in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice states Gross Weight: 11884,00 kg. Value 24040 does NOT appear anywhere in the invoice. 11884 ≠ 24040.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate also states '4' units in box 6. Invoice states quantity 2. 4 ≠ 2. This is also a mismatch.
comparison_steps.result: Both GW and unit count differ. GW: 24040 vs 11884 (difference ~102%). Units: 4 vs 2.

3A: Not applicable (single invoice). 3B: Not applicable (both in kg already). 3C: Not applicable (not per-unit weight derivation scenario). 3D: Not applicable (invoice has only one goods line showing 2 units at 11884 kg). 3E: Not applicable (individual row weights 6010 kg x 2 = 12020, still not 24040). No exception resolves the discrepancy.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate GW 24040 kg cannot be identified in invoice. Invoice GW is 11884 kg. The values represent different shipments (4 chassis vs 2 chassis). Clear MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 GW 24040 kg is the verification-basis quantity
Occurrence check failed: 24040 not found in invoice
Express contradiction: invoice states 11884 kg GW vs certificate 24040 kg GW

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'GW 24040 kg'. Invoice Gross Weight: '11884,00' kg. The numeric value 24040 does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The invoice gross weight is 11884 kg — roughly half of the certificate's value, consistent with the invoice covering 2 chassis vs the certificate's 4 chassis. This is an express contradiction per rule 4.4.3.1: both documents state GW explicitly and the values differ by approximately 102%, far exceeding the ±0.1% tolerance. MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Accept 11884 as approximately half of 24040 since the invoice covers half the chassis
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rule 4.4.5, no proportional calculations are allowed. The certificate and invoice describe different shipments. The numeric value must be identifiable per occurrence check. 24040 ≠ 11884.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin indication in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has dedicated field 'Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods: Sweden'. Also confirmed in certification text: 'the county of origin or manufacturer of the goods is Sweden'.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice field 'Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods': 'Sweden'. Exact match. Additionally confirmed by invoice certification text. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.notes: No LC reference found in certificate
Certificate from Document A page 1. Invoice for verification from Document B page 1 (invoice 25-815758). Embedded invoice 25-815756 in Document A pages 2-3 is NOT used for verification.
Consignor and consignee both identifiable in invoice. Validation passed despite goods content mismatch (evaluated in checkpoints).
Volvo Bus Corporation found in invoice header, footer, and buyer block
Primary consignee field found in invoice
Certificate: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE'. Invoice: 'Volvo Bus chassis B8R'. Model B8RLE ≠ B8R. Additionally, all 4 VIN numbers differ completely.
Certificate GW 24040 kg. Invoice GW 11884 kg. Value 24040 not found in invoice.
Certificate does not specify per-unit weight
Single goods line in invoice. Individual chassis weights (6010 x 2 = 12020) do not equal 24040.
Total GW is stated in invoice (11884). Summation would not resolve discrepancy.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country of origin identification in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.notes: Dedicated field 'Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods: Sweden'

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet avser 4 stycken Volvo Bus Chassis B8RLE med chassinummer 224281, 224317, 224318 och 224319, med en bruttovikt på 24 040 kg. Den bifogade fakturan (25-815758) avser istället 2 stycken Volvo Bus chassis B8R med helt andra chassinummer (224321 och 224336) och en bruttovikt på 11 884 kg. Varubeskrivning, antal, chassinummer och vikt stämmer inte överens – certifikatet och fakturan avser olika försändelser.
overall_assessment.summary: NOT_IDENTICAL: The certificate describes 4 Volvo Bus Chassis B8RLE (VINs 224281/224317/224318/224319, GW 24040 kg). The invoice (25-815758) describes 2 Volvo Bus chassis B8R (VINs 224321/224336, GW 11884 kg). Different model, different quantity, different VIN numbers, different weight. The certificate file contains an embedded copy of invoice 25-815756 which would match the certificate, but per rule 8.5.0 verification must use the separate invoice file (Document B) which contains invoice 25-815758.
blocking_issues: Goods description MISMATCH: Certificate model B8RLE vs invoice model B8R; all VIN numbers differ completely
Quantity MISMATCH: Certificate GW 24040 kg vs invoice GW 11884 kg; certificate 4 units vs invoice 2 units
non_blocking_notes: Consignor, consignee, and country of origin all match correctly
The certificate file contains an embedded invoice (25-815756) that would match the certificate – the correct invoice may have been filed as Document B in error

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Volvo Bus Corporation, Gropegårdsgatan 1, 405 08, GOTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Volvo Bus Corporation, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden (VAT No SE556197382601)
sections.rule_applied: Direct name match in invoice header and footer; country verified via address and VAT prefix SE
sections.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' is directly identifiable in the invoice header, footer, and buyer block. Country Sweden confirmed via footer address and VAT prefix SE. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E, Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo, Egypt
sections.invoice_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E., Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo - Egypt
sections.rule_applied: Direct name match in invoice Mottagare/Consignee field; country Egypt matches
sections.motivation: Certificate consignee 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' matches invoice consignee 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.' — identical after minor punctuation normalization. Address and country (Egypt) match. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: 4 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE, VIN: YV3T7U529TA224281, YV3T7U524TA224317, YV3T7U526TA224318, YV3T7U528TA224319
sections.invoice_value: Volvo Bus chassis B8R, Qty 2, Chassis No 224321, 224336, VIN No YV3T7U526TA224321, YV3T7U528TA224336
sections.rule_applied: Identity-bearing main designation 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' cannot be identified in invoice which states 'Volvo Bus chassis B8R'. Model differs (B8RLE vs B8R). All VIN numbers differ completely. Quantity differs (4 vs 2).
sections.motivation: Three critical discrepancies: (1) Model B8RLE in certificate vs B8R in invoice — different model designations, not a normalization issue. (2) All four VIN numbers in the certificate are completely absent from the invoice. (3) Certificate lists 4 units, invoice lists 2 units. The certificate and invoice describe entirely different shipments. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Box 7 GW 24040 kg is the verification-basis. Invoice Gross Weight is 11884 kg. The value 24040 does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Express contradiction: both documents state GW explicitly and values differ by approximately 102%.
sections.motivation: Certificate GW 24040 kg. Invoice GW 11884,00 kg. The values differ by approximately 12156 kg (102%), far exceeding the ±0.1% tolerance. Both documents explicitly state Gross Weight, creating an express contradiction per rule 4.4.3.1. No exceptions (3A-3E) are applicable. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Exact match in dedicated origin field
sections.motivation: Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice 'Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods': 'Sweden'. Exact match confirmed. Additionally corroborated by invoice certification text stating origin is Sweden. MATCH.

human_readable_report.conclusion: NOT_IDENTICAL. Consignor, consignee and country of origin match. However, goods description and quantity are MISMATCH — the certificate describes 4 Volvo Bus Chassis B8RLE (specific VINs, GW 24040 kg) while the separate invoice file contains invoice 25-815758 describing 2 Volvo Bus chassis B8R (different VINs, GW 11884 kg). The documents appear to relate to different shipments. Manual handling required.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: Two applicable checkpoints (goods_description, quantity) have MISMATCH status. comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL, consistent with rule 6.1. workflow_recommendation is MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED, consistent with rule 6.3. All checkpoint motivations are consistent with their status values.
